title: Wild Tool Access
description: Adds an item quick select, inspired by the one in "Zelda: Breath of the Wild".
body:
# Wild Tool Access

This client side mod adds two customizable quick select bars, similar to the one in "The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild", which you can open with hotkeys to quickly access all the tools, or any other item type you specify in the config, in your inventory.

![bar image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/448/262/default-bar-1-pic2.jpg)

## Customization

The config options can be changed in the config file or, with the help of [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu), in game (requires [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)) and can be used to change:

- the position of the bars
- the distance between the individual slots
- the content of the bars
- the texture of the individual bars
- the selection sound

and more.
More detailed Information can be found [here](https://github.com/TrueHorse/Wild-Tool-Access/wiki/Customization).
